sources.title: History Grade 10 - Topic 1 The Ming Dynasty
History Grade 10 - Topic 1 The Mughal Empire

slides.heading: Umhlaba Cishe Ngo-1600
slides.lead: Imiphakathi emine ecebile, enamandla nehluke kakhulu - iMing yaseShayina, iSonghai, iMughal yaseNdiya kanye neYurophu - lapho sekuseduze isikhathi sezwe elixhumene emhlabeni wonke.

image.alt: Ibalazwe lomhlaba elilungiswe ngobuciko elinezifunda ezine ezikhanyayo emhlabeni wonke - e-Asia, eNtshonalanga Afrika naseYurophu.

slides.notes: Qala ngokuphonsela inselele umbono ojwayelekile wokuthi iYurophu 'yayibusa' umhlaba ngo-1600. Empeleni yayingabusi. Cishe ngo-1600 amazwe acebe kakhulu, anabantu abaningi kanye nawohulumeni abaphathwe ngobuchule ayese-Asia nase-Afrika. Beka umsebenzi omkhulu wesifundo: ukuqhathanisa imiphakathi emine emikhulu ngendlela enobulungiswa, nokubuza ukuthi kungani ibhalansi lamandla lalizoshintsha kumakhulu eminyaka alandelayo. Chaza ukuthi 'cishe ngo-1600' kusho cishe u-1450-1650.

slides.heading: Kungani sifunda ngomhlaba wango-1600?
slides.lead: U-1600 uyisikhathi sokuguquka - ngaphambi nje kokuthi ukwanda kweYurophu ngaphesheya kolwandle kuguqule umhlaba.

blocks.text: Ukufunda ngemiphakathi eminingi ngesikhathi esisodwa kusivumela ukuthi **siyiqhathanise** ngendlela enobulungiswa, esikhundleni sokulandisa umlando weYurophu kuphela. Cishe ngo-1600 izikhungo zomhlaba zomcebo, zolwazi namandla zaziseningi **ngaphandle** kweYurophu.

items: Kubeka isisekelo ngaphambi kokuthi ukwanda kwamakoloni aseYurophu kusheshise.
Kulungisa umbono ogxile eYurophu ngokukhombisa amazwe ase-Afrika nase-Asia acophelele.
Kusiza ukuchaza izimpande zokunqoba, uhwebo kanye nobugqila okwaguqula iNingizimu Afrika kamuva.

slides.notes: Gcizelela injongo yokuhlaziya (izinga le-FET): ukuqhathanisa, imibono ehlukene kanye nembangela. Xwayisa abafundi ngokulandisa okuthi 'iYurophu yayihlala iphambili' - lokho akulona iqiniso ngokomlando ngo-1600. Xhuma phambili: iDutch East India Company (i-VOC), eyasungulwa ngo-1602, kamuva yayizosungula isiteshi sokuvuselela eKapa ngo-1652, yingakho lesi sithombe somhlaba wonke sibalulekile emlandweni waseNingizimu Afrika.

slides.heading: Isithombe esikhulu, cishe ngo-1600
slides.lead: Umphakathi ngamunye wawuhlelwe ngendlela ehlukile, kodwa ngamunye wawucebile futhi uthuthuke kakhulu.

blocks.heading: iMing yaseShayina
blocks.text: Izwe elikhulu neliceba kunawo wonke emhlabeni - umbuso omkhulu ohlanganisiwe ophethwe abasebenzi bakahulumeni abaqeqeshiwe.

blocks.heading: iSonghai
blocks.text: Umbuso omkhulu waseNtshonalanga Afrika wangeminyaka yawo-1500, owakhelwe egolideni, kusawoti nasekufundeni kwamaSulumane.

blocks.heading: iMughal yaseNdiya
blocks.text: Umbuso ocebile, onezinhlobonhlobo, odume ngezindwangu, ubuciko kanye (ngaphansi kuka-Akbar) nokubekezelela izinkolo.

blocks.heading: iYurophu
blocks.text: Hhayi izwe elilodwa kodwa imibuso eminingi eqhudelanayo - ehlukene, encintisanayo futhi iphendukela olwandle.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lawa makhadi amane njengebalazwe lesifundo sonke - amaslayidi amane alandelayo athatha ngamunye ngokulandelana. Cela abafundi ukuthi babikezele, ngale mishwana emifushane kuphela, ukuthi bacabanga ukuthi yimuphi umphakathi owawunamandla amakhulu ngo-1600 nokuthi kungani. Iningi lizoqagela iYurophu; isifundo sizowenza mumbe lowo mqagelo.

slides.heading: iMing yaseShayina (1368-1644)
slides.lead: Cishe ngo-1600 iShayina yayinabantu abaningi futhi mhlawumbe iyona miphakathi eyayiceba kunayo yonke emhlabeni.

blocks.text: Ubukhosi be-**Ming** babusa umbuso ohlangene wabantu abangaphezu kwezigidi ezingu-100. Uhulumeni wawuphethwe abasebenzi abangongoti abakhethwa ngokusebenzisa **izivivinyo zabasebenzi bakahulumeni** ezinzima, ezazihlola ulwazi lwemibhalo yamaConfucius. Umbusi wayebusa ese-**Forbidden City** eBeijing.

items: iShayina yayithumela ngaphandle usilika, itiye kanye nesitsha esihle sebumba, idonsela ngaphakathi inqwaba yesiliva laseMelika naseJapane.
Imikhumbi yamagugu yeMing yangaphambili ngaphansi kuka-Admiral Zheng He (1405-1433) yayikade ihambe iya ekude njengaseMpumalanga Afrika.
Ngo-1600 umbuso wawusuphendukele ngaphakathi kakhulu, ukhawulela uhambo lwaphesheya kolwandle futhi wakha kabusha uGreat Wall.

image.alt: Isango lesigodlo saseShayina esilinganayo ezinhlangothini, esinophahla oluqoqene, esimele iForbidden City.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='40' y='96' width='140' height='44' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='40' y='86' width='140' height='12' fill='#5c1414'/><path d='M30 86 L110 56 L190 86 Z' fill='#c8892f'/><path d='M52 60 L110 36 L168 60 Z' fill='#e0a33e'/><rect x='100' y='112' width='20' height='28' fill='#3a1010'/><rect x='60' y='112' width='14' height='20' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='146' y='112' width='14' height='20' fill='#f4efe6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcizelela ubukhulu nobuchule: uhulumeni osekelwe kumakhono amakhulu eminyaka ngaphambi kokuthi iningi leYurophu libe nawo, kanye nomnotho omkhulu kangangokuthi wamunca iningi lesiliva lomhlaba. Chaza ukubaluleka kokuhoxiswa kwemikhumbi yamagugu - kwakuwukukhetha, hhayi ukwehluleka - okwakusho ukuthi iShayina yayingazingeli imibuso yaphesheya njengoba nje amaYurophu ayeqala. [SME] Qinisekisa izibalo zabantu nezohwebo lwesiliva kancwadi lwamanje lwesikole ngaphambi kokukhipha.

slides.heading: Umbuso waseSonghai
slides.lead: Umbuso omkhulu kunayo yonke emlandweni waseNtshonalanga Afrika, esikhathini sawo esiphakeme phakathi neminyaka yawo-1400 nawo-1500.

blocks.text: Ugxile edolobheni lase-**Gao** emfuleni iNiger, iSonghai yakhula yaba namandla ngaphansi kuka-**Sunni Ali** ikakhulukazi u-**Askia Muhammad** (owabusa ngo-1493-1528). Umcebo wayo wawuvela ekulawuleni **uhwebo oludabula iSahara** lwegolide nosawoti, futhi wawuyizwe lamaSulumane elinohulumeni oqinile kanye nebutho.

items: iTimbuktu neDjenne kwakuyizikhungo ezidumile zokufunda kwamaSulumane, ezinamanyuvesi namalabhulali emibhalo yesandla.
Abahwebi babeshintshanisa igolide laseNtshonalanga Afrika ngosawoti, indwangu, izincwadi namahhashi avela eNyakatho Afrika.
Ngo-1591 ibutho laseMorocco elinezibhamu lehlula iSonghai eMpini yaseTondibi, futhi umbuso wahlakazeka.

image.alt: Imosque yezitini zodaka enemishayo yokusekela yezingodo kanye nesigxobo eside sokubiza, njengeGreat Mosque of Djenne.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='220' height='16' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='40' y='70' width='120' height='58' fill='#c9852f'/><rect x='96' y='40' width='24' height='88' fill='#c9852f'/><rect x='102' y='24' width='12' height='16' fill='#c9852f'/><circle cx='108' cy='22' r='4' fill='#e0a33e'/><rect x='56' y='58' width='10' height='70' fill='#b5771f'/><rect x='134' y='58' width='10' height='70' fill='#b5771f'/><g fill='#7a4d18'><rect x='48' y='84' width='10' height='4'/><rect x='142' y='84' width='10' height='4'/><rect x='48' y='100' width='10' height='4'/><rect x='142' y='100' width='10' height='4'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Leli slayidi liphethe iphuzu elibalulekile: ngokoqobo, iSonghai yawa ngo-1591, ngaphambi nje kuka-1600. ICAPS isayifunda njengomphakathi omkhulu 'cishe ngo-1600' ngoba yabusa iNtshonalanga Afrika ikhulu leminyaka elandulele. Yiba nesiqiniseko kubafundi ngale sikhathi. Sebenzisa imibhalo yesandla yaseTimbuktu ukuphikisa inganekwane yokuthi i-Afrika yangaphambi kwamakoloni yayingenalo ulwazi olubhaliwe. [SME] Qinisekisa izinsuku zika-Askia Muhammad kanye nosuku luka-1591/iMpi yaseTondibi ngokwesihloko seSonghai se-SAHO.

slides.heading: iMughal yaseNdiya
slides.lead: Cishe ngo-1600 uMbuso weMughal ngaphansi kuka-Akbar wawungomunye wemibuso eceba futhi enamasiko amahle kunayo yonke emhlabeni.

blocks.text: **UMbuso weMughal** (owasungulwa ngo-1526) wawulawula iningi lezwekazi laseNdiya. Umbusi wawo omkhulu, u-**Akbar** (owabusa ngo-1556-1605), wakha uhlelo lwentela nolokuphatha olusebenza kahle futhi wagqugquzela inqubomgomo **yokubekezelela izinkolo** (sulh-i-kul, 'ukuthula nabo bonke') phakathi kwamaHindu, amaSulumane nabanye.

items: iNdiya yayingumkhiqizi ophambili emhlabeni wezindwangu zikakotini ezinhle, ezazihwetshwa kulo lonke i-Asia, i-Afrika neYurophu.
Amakhosi eMughal akhiqiza ubuciko obumangalisayo, izakhiwo (kamuva iTaj Mahal) nemibhalo.
Izinkampani zohwebo zaseYurophu zafika eNdiya njengabalingani abancane befuna ukufinyelela empahleni yayo.

image.alt: Isigodlo esinophahla oluyindingilizi olunama-arch acijile nezinqaba ezizacile, ngesitayela sokwakha samaMughal.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='220' height='16' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='58' y='78' width='104' height='50' fill='#e4ddd0'/><path d='M78 78 a32 34 0 0 1 64 0 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M96 40 q14 -22 28 0 q6 20 -14 20 q-20 0 -14 -20 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='110' cy='30' r='4' fill='#c8892f'/><rect x='44' y='70' width='10' height='58' fill='#e4ddd0'/><rect x='166' y='70' width='10' height='58' fill='#e4ddd0'/><path d='M100 104 a10 12 0 0 1 20 0 Z' fill='#8a6d3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gqamisa amaphuzu amabili okuqhathanisa: umcebo weMughal (imboni yezindwangu yaseNdiya yayibusa umhlaba wonke) kanye nokubekezela okuhlosiwe kuka-Akbar, okuwumehluko omkhulu ezimpini zenkolo zaseYurophu zesikhathi esifanayo. Qaphela ubudlelwano bamandla: abahwebi baseYurophu bafika njengabacelayo, hhayi abanqobi - okuphambene nesithombe samakoloni kamuva. Lokhu kubukisa kabusha inkomba yamandla ngeminyaka yawo-1600.

slides.heading: Imiphakathi yaseYurophu
slides.lead: Hhayi umbuso owodwa kodwa amazwe amaningi encintisanayo - ehlukene, angakhululekile futhi aphendukela ngaphandle.

blocks.text: iYurophu cishe ngo-1600 yayihlukaniswe yaba imibuso eqhudelanayo namadolobha-mazwe, ikhathazwa **yiRenaissance**, **iReformation** kanye nezimpi zayo zenkolo. Yayincane futhi impofu kuneMing yaseShayina noma iMughal yaseNdiya, kodwa noma kunjalo yayakha amathuluzi amasha ayezoba nomthelela omkhulu: **umshini wokucindezela** (i-printing press), izikhali zomsizi, imikhumbi ehamba olwandle kanye nezinkampani zamasheya ahlanganyelwe.

items: iPhurtugali neSpain kwase kuvule izindlela zolwandle eziya eMelika, e-Afrika nase-Asia.
Izinkampani zaseNgilandi (1600) nezaseDashi (i-VOC, 1602) zaseMpumalanga Ndiya zasungulwa ukuze zizuze kuhwebo lwase-Asia.
Ukuncintisana phakathi kwamazwe kwaqhuba ukuhlola, izimpi kanye nokuqala kwamakoloni aphesheya.

image.alt: Umkhumbi wokuhamba onezinsika ezintathu onamaseyili avuthelwayo emagagasini alungiswe ngobuciko.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#cfe0e8'/><path d='M0 120 q30 -8 55 0 t55 0 t55 0 t55 0 v40 H0 Z' fill='#7fa7bb'/><path d='M60 118 h100 l-14 -20 H74 Z' fill='#6b3f1d'/><rect x='108' y='40' width='4' height='60' fill='#4a2c14'/><path d='M112 46 q34 6 30 40 l-30 0 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M108 46 q-34 6 -30 40 l30 0 Z' fill='#e6dccb'/><path d='M110 40 l14 -6 l-14 -4 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lungisa ukulandelana: ngo-1600 iYurophu yayisemaphethelweni, hhayi enkabeni. Inzuzo yayo yayingesona ubukhulu noma umcebo kodwa inhlanganisela yokuncintisana, amandla olwandle, ezimali (izinkampani zamasheya ahlanganyelwe) kanye nobuchwepheshe bezempi, kuhlanganise nokufinyelela esiliveni laseMelika nasemhlabeni. Yethula i-VOC lapha ukuze abafundi babambe intambo eya eKapa ngo-1652. Chaza ukwanda kweYurophu ngokungakhethi manje; ukuziphatha kuza kumaslayidi alandelayo.

slides.heading: Ukuqhathanisa imiphakathi emine
slides.lead: Bheka amaphethini okufana nawokwehluka kuhulumeni, umcebo kanye nombono.

items: Inani labantu elikhulu nokulima okukhiqizayo.
Amanethiwekhi ohwebo lwamabanga amade namadolobha.
Amazwe ahleliwe anababusi, izintela namabutho.
Impilo enothile yenkolo, yolwazi neyobuciko.
iShayina namaMughal: imibuso emikhulu eyodwa; iYurophu: amazwe amaningi aqhudelanayo.
iSonghai namaMughal: ukubusa kwamaSulumane nokwezinkolo eziningi; iYurophu: yehlukaniswa yiReformation.
iShayina yaphendukela ngaphakathi; iYurophu yaphendukela ngaphandle olwandle.
iYurophu yakha izinkampani zamasheya ahlanganyelwe ukuxhasa imisebenzi yaphesheya.

slides.notes: Lena yinhliziyo yokuhlaziya yesifundo. Bonisa ukucabanga okuqhathanisayo: khetha isihloko (isb. uhulumeni, inkolo, noma umbono ngokwanda kwaphesheya) uwulandele kuyo yonke imiphakathi emine. Qhubekisela abafundi ngale kokubhala amaqiniso kuye ekuchazeni ukubaluleka - ikakhulukazi umehluko phakathi kweShayina ephendukela ngaphakathi neYurophu ephendukela ngaphandle, okusiza ukuchaza izinguquko zamandla omhlaba kamuva.

slides.heading: Uhwebo lwaluhlanganisa umhlaba ndawonye
slides.lead: Ngo-1600 impahla, isiliva, imibono nabantu babehamba phakathi kwayo yonke le miphakathi.

blocks.text: Le miphakathi yayingazilili yodwa. Izindlela **ezidabula iSahara** zaxhuma iNtshonalanga Afrika neMeditera; inethiwekhi **ye-Indian Ocean** yaxhuma iMpumalanga Afrika, i-Arabia, iNdiya neShayina; futhi izindlela ezintsha **ze-Atlantic** zahlanganisa iYurophu, i-Afrika neMelika. Isiliva laseMelika lageleza liya empumalanga lithenga usilika nebumba laseShayina.

items: Igolide, usawoti, izinyo lendlovu, izindwangu, iziyoliso nebumba kwawela amazwekazi.
Izindlela ze-Atlantic zaziphinde zithwale uhwebo olukhulayo, olunonya lwabantu base-Afrika abagqilaziwe.
Lesi 'sikhathi sokuqala somhlaba wonke' sabeka isisekelo sokwanda kwamakoloni aseYurophu.

image.alt: Umdwebo olula wemicibisholo yohwebo exhuma iNtshonalanga Afrika, iYurophu, iNdiya neShayina.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 150' role='img'><rect width='260' height='150' fill='#eef3f6'/><g font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#333'><circle cx='50' cy='95' r='16' fill='#c9b98f'/><text x='50' y='125' text-anchor='middle'>W. Africa</text><circle cx='110' cy='40' r='16' fill='#b7c8a8'/><text x='110' y='20' text-anchor='middle'>Europe</text><circle cx='170' cy='95' r='16' fill='#c9852f'/><text x='170' y='125' text-anchor='middle'>India</text><circle cx='225' cy='45' r='16' fill='#8a1f1f'/><text x='225' y='26' text-anchor='middle'>China</text></g><g stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><path d='M64 88 L98 50'/><path d='M124 48 L156 86'/><path d='M184 86 L212 56'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Qinisa ukuxhumana: u-1600 uvame ukubizwa ngokuqala 'kwesikhathi sokuqala somhlaba wonke' ngoba okokuqala zonke izifunda ezinkulu zomhlaba zaxhunyaniswa ngohwebo oluvamile. Yethula uhwebo lwezigqila lwe-Atlantic ngokwethembeka kodwa ngokufaneleka ngokweminyaka lapha - lubize njengohlelo lwabasebenzi abaphoqelelwe nokuhlupheka kwabantu olwakhula kanye nalolu hwebo, ngaphandle kwemininingwane eshaqisayo. Lubuya kuslayidi lokuziphatha.

slides.heading: Izikhathi ezibalulekile, cishe ngo-1450-1652

blocks.alt: Uhla lwezikhathi olusuka maphakathi nawo-1400 luya ku-1652 luphawula izehlakalo ezibalulekile eShayina, e-Afrika, eNdiya naseYurophu.

events.label: U-Askia Muhammad uqala isikhathi segolide seSonghai
Izinkampani zaseNgilandi neDashi (i-VOC) zaseMpumalanga Ndiya zasungulwa

slides.notes: Sebenzisa uhla lwezikhathi ukulungisa ukulandelana nokwenza ukuxhumana neNingizimu Afrika kucace ekupheleni: ukwanda kohwebo kweYurophu okufanayo obonakala ngo-1600 kwafika eKapa ngo-1652. Cela abafundi ukuthi baqaphele ukuthi zisondelene kangakanani u-1591 (ukuwa kweSonghai) no-1600-1602 (izinkampani zohwebo) - ukudluliselwa okungakwamandla.

slides.heading: Umlando kabani esiwulandisayo?
slides.lead: Ubufakazi buka-1600 buphonsela inselele umbono wokuthi iYurophu yayihlala ingumholi womhlaba.

blocks.text: Isikhathi eside umlando wawubhalwa ikakhulukazi **ngombono waseYurophu**, uphatha eminye imiphakathi 'njengesalele emuva'. Umhlaba ka-1600 ubonisa okuphambene: iShayina, iSonghai neMughal yaseNdiya kwakuthuthuke njenge - ngokuvamile ngaphezu kwe - Yurophu. Izazi-mlando ezinhle zilinganisa **imibono ehlukene** futhi ziyayibuza imithombo yazo.

items: Buza ukuthi ubani owakhiqiza umthombo, nokuthi iphi izwi elingekho.
Impumelelo yase-Afrika nase-Asia isemqoka, hhayi umbhalo ophansi, emlandweni womhlaba.
Ukuqonda u-1600 ngokunobulungiswa kusisiza siqonde indlela amandla ashintsha ngayo kamuva - nokuthi kungani.

slides.notes: Leli slayidi lakha ikhono le-CAPS lokusebenza nombono nokuchema. Khuthaza abafundi ukuthi baqambe ingozi yendaba eyodwa. Xhuma nesimo sabo: iningi lomlando wobukoloni eNingizimu Afrika lalulokhu lulandiswa ngombono wabahlali. Ukulungisa akukhona ukushintshela enganekwaneni entsha kodwa ukulinganisa ubufakazi ngokucophelela.

slides.heading: Ukwanda, ukunqoba nobugqila
slides.lead: Umhlaba oxhumene wango-1600 waphinde wavula umnyango wokunqoba nohwebo lwabantu abagqilaziwe.

blocks.text: Ukwanda kweYurophu kwaphesheya kwaletha uhwebo olusha nokuxhumana, kodwa kwaphinde kwaletha **ukunqoba kwamakoloni** kanye **nohwebo lwezigqila lwe-Atlantic** olukhulayo olwaphoqa izigidi zabantu base-Afrika ebugqilini. Sikufunda ngokwethembeka lokhu, sikhumbula ukuthi laba kwakungabantu bangempela, hhayi izibalo nje.
Umlando awukona okwabanamandla kuphela; kufanele futhi ubuyise okuhlangenwe nakho kwalabo abanqotshwa, abahwetshwa nabathuliswa.

items: Ukwanda kwakunabanqobi nezisulu - kokubili kufanele kube semlandweni.
Ifa lohwebo lwezigqila lisaqhubeka luguqula imiphakathi, kuhlanganise neNingizimu Afrika, nanamuhla.

slides.notes: Sondela kuleli slayidi ngokunakekela nangesithunzi. Inhloso ukwethembeka ngaphandle kokwenza umsindo: qamba ubudlova bamakoloni nohwebo lwezigqila ngokucacile, vuma ubuntu babagqilaziwe nabanqotshwa, futhi gwema izithombe ezishaqisayo. Mema ingxoxo ecabangelayo (hhayi ecindezelayo). Lokhu kubopha isici sokuziphatha eCAPS elilindele futhi kuxhuma umlando womhlaba nesikhathi esidlule seNingizimu Afrika.

slides.heading: Bukeza: umhlaba cishe ngo-1600
slides.lead: Cishe ngo-1600 amandla amakhulu omhlaba ayesabalele kulo lonke i-Asia ne-Afrika; ukukhula kweYurophu kwakusesezoza.

blocks.text: iMing yaseShayina, iSonghai neMughal yaseNdiya kwakucebile, kubuswa kahle futhi kunothile ngamasiko, kanti iYurophu eyayihlukene yayiseqala nje ukufinyelela ngaphandle. Uhwebo lwahlanganisa le mihlaba ndawonye - futhi lolo kuxhumana lwaluzogcina seluguqula ibhalansi lamandla omhlaba, ekugcineni lufinyelele eKapa.

blocks.question: Qhathanisa iMing yaseShayina neYurophu cishe ngo-1600 ngokuhlelwa kwezepolitiki kanye nombono ngokwanda kwaphesheya.
Chaza ukuthi uhwebo lwaxhuma kanjani iNtshonalanga Afrika, iNdiya neShayina emhlabeni obanzi ngo-1600. Bhekisela okungenani kumanethiwekhi amabili ohwebo.
"Ngo-1600, iYurophu yayingakabi yingxenye enamandla amakhulu yomhlaba." Usebenzisa ubufakazi obuvela okungenani kwimiphakathi emibili, uyavuma? Chaza impendulo yakho.

slides.notes: Vala ngokubuyela embuzweni wokuqala: ubani 'owayephambili' ngo-1600? Ubufakazi buthi akuyona iYurophu. Sebenzisa le mibuzo emithathu ukuhlola okubhaliwe noma inkulumo-mpikiswano; izisindo zamamaki zilingisa imisebenzi ye-CAPS esekelwe kumthombo neyokubhala okwandisiwe. Umbuzo wamamaki angu-10 uyisikhuthazo sokubhala okwandisiwe okudinga umqondo ocacile wempikiswano nobufakazi. Khumbuza abafundi ukuthi lesi sihloko sibeka isisekelo sokufunda kwe-Grade 10 kamuva ngokwanda kwamakoloni eNingizimu Afrika.
